RULING:
Court reviews pleadings submitted by Defendant this morning. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED:
DEFENDANT ARLENE KONG'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint: GRANTED as to paragraph 7 re: arrears in rent. Order signed. (AJR/301//EH) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620

MINI MINUTES:

Arlene Kong, Defendant Propria Persona and Moving Party
Ilene M. Hochstein, Esq. (650) 877-8288, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Huey
RULING:
Court reviewed pleadings submitted this morning; TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT ARLENE KONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED.
